title: Elixir OTP
summary: A build-it-up field guide to Elixir OTP in the voice of The Crafter: isolated processes and the actor model, let-it-crash with links and monitors, GenServer, static and dynamic supervisors, Registry naming, Task/Agent, and the Application boot tree. Includes a 2D actor/mailbox animation and an interactive 3D supervision tree that crashes and heals in real time.

images.alt: A glowing supervision tree of luminous purple nodes over a dark workshop bench
images.caption: A supervision tree: the shape of an OTP system, and the shape of this book.
images.prompt: A warm, elegant editorial illustration of a supervision tree rendered as a living organism: a single luminous purple root node at the top branching down into smaller glowing nodes, one small node shown mid-shatter with fireflies of light already reforming it - the idea of 'let it crash, then heal.' Amethyst purple and warm amber light on a deep-charcoal workshop background with faint blueprint lines, soft bokeh, flat-vector-meets-painterly, generous whitespace, no text baked in. Target size ~1350x900px, 3:2 landscape; compose with the tree centred and safe margins - it is letterboxed into a 3:2 box, so keep nothing important near the edges.
